use_codes.desc: TREATMENT OF PATIENTS WITH ANAPLASTIC LYMPHOMA KINASE (ALK)-POSITIVE METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC) WHO HAVE PROGRESSED ON OR ARE INTOLERANT TO CRIZOTINIB
TREATMENT OF ANAPLASTIC LYMPHOMA KINASE (ALK)-POSITIVE METASTATIC NON-SMALL CELL LUNG CANCER (NSCLC)

indications.text: 7.2 Effect of ALUNBRIG on Other Drugs

ALUNBRIG is indicated for the treatment of patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive metastatic non-small cell lung
cancer (NSCLC) who have progressed on or are intolerant to crizotinib.
This indication is approved under accelerated approval based on tumor response rate and duration of...
